deviceProfile.description: Brother IntelliFAX 2840 is a versatile multi-function device combining fax modem, laser printer, scanner, and copier capabilities. Widely used in offices for document management and faxing.

fax.title: Faxing (T.30 Protocol)
fax.description: Send and receive faxes using ITU-T T.30 protocol

operations.name: Send Fax
operations.notes: Data must be in TIFF-F format. Device handles T.30 protocol automatically.

operations.name: Receive Fax
operations.notes: Automatic on incoming call. Data returned in TIFF-F format.

knownIssues: May require T.30 protocol handler in userspace for full functionality
bestPractices: Always validate TIFF-F format before sending
Handle timeouts (30+ seconds for long distance)
Implement retry logic for failed transmissions

printing.title: Printing
printing.description: Print documents with advanced paper handling and quality settings
paperSizes: Special: Postcard, B5, B6, DL, C5, Com-10, Monarch
mediaTypes: Thick paper - Card stock up to 220gsm
paperSources: Tray1, Tray2, Tray3 - Automatic trays (if present)
duplexModes: DuplexLongEdge - Duplex, bindings on long edge
DuplexShortEdge - Duplex, bindings on short edge
knownIssues: Thick media may require manual paper source

troubleshooting.faint_output: Enable toner save mode or reduce brightness setting
troubleshooting.paper_jam: Clear jam, check paper quality, use appropriate paper source
troubleshooting.misfeeds: Reduce paper source stack height, use manual feed for thick media

scanning.title: Document Scanning
scanning.description: Scan documents with flexible resolution and color options
colorModes: Black & White (B/W) - Binary, minimum file size
features: Auto crop - Remove white borders automatically
Auto detect resolution - Optimize for content
bestPractices: 300 DPI is optimal balance for most documents
Use B/W for text-heavy documents (smaller files)
Use Color for photos and mixed content
Test auto crop with non-standard document sizes

scanToEmail.title: Scan to Email
scanToEmail.description: Scan documents and email them directly from the device
knownLimitations: Attachment file size limited by device memory (~10MB)
SMTP authentication may require App passwords (Gmail, Office365)
TLS may not be available on older firmware

troubleshooting.delivery_failed: Check SMTP configuration, verify firewall rules
troubleshooting.large_files: Split scan into multiple emails or reduce resolution
troubleshooting.authentication_failed: Use SMTP app password instead of account password

scanToNetwork.title: Scan to Network Folder
scanToNetwork.description: Save scanned documents directly to network storage
setup: Test connectivity from device web UI
knownIssues: SFTP may not be available on all firmware versions
Network timeouts may occur with slow networks

copy.title: Document Copying
limitations: Reduce/Enlarge not available with some media types
Color copy uses more toner than B/W

firmware.title: Firmware Updates
firmware.description: Update device firmware for bug fixes and feature improvements
updateProcess: 1. Download firmware from Brother support website
2. Connect device via USB to computer
4. Wait for device to restart (5-10 minutes)
5. Verify new firmware version in device menu
safety: NEVER power off during firmware update
NEVER disconnect USB cable during update
Device has automatic recovery if update fails
knownIssues: Updates may require specific Windows version
Some firmware versions have issues - check Brother knowledge base

network.title: Network Configuration
network.description: Configure device networking for connectivity and services
configurationOptions: Static IP - Manual IP address configuration
setup: 2. Configure network protocol (IPv4, IPv6, or both)
5. Verify connectivity by printing network config page

troubleshooting.no_network: Check cable, restart device, verify DHCP enabled
troubleshooting.slow_performance: Check network load, move device closer to router
troubleshooting.cannot_scan_email: Verify SMTP server access, check firewall rules

addressBook.title: Phonebook/Address Book
addressBook.description: Store fax numbers and recipient information
features: Groups - Multiple recipients in one group
Distribution lists - Send to multiple recipients
usage: Add entries via device keypad or web UI
Group entries by department or location
Use speed dials for frequently-used numbers
Backup address book to USB or email regularly

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics & Troubleshooting
diagnostics.description: Monitor device health and troubleshoot issues
features: Error log - History of device errors
commonErrors: Paper jam - Clear jammed paper from all locations
Low toner - Order replacement toner cartridge
Door open - Close all covers and access panels
Network error - Check cable and network settings

commonIssues.solution: Check USB cable, restart computer, update drivers
Check phone line connection, verify destination number, check fax transmission log
Clean printer heads, check toner level, verify paper quality
Verify network connectivity, check SMB/SFTP configuration, test with network share
Restart device, verify USB connection, re-download firmware, check power supply
